summary: Iteration 3 backend testing complete. All 30 new tests for Balance Sheet/PnL upload, financial ratios, downloadable CSV templates, /seed-financials idempotency, and Recovery AI Copilot pass. All 54 prior iteration_2 tests still pass (1 skipped). Claude Sonnet recovery copilot responded successfully in <30s.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with empty payload when borrower_id does not exist instead of 404. Minor inconsistency vs other endpoints which return 404 for unknown borrower (e.g. /borrowers/{id}/details). Not a blocker.
Available to any authenticated user (no role gate). Other seed/destructive endpoints (e.g. /api/seed) are also open to any user — consider gating to admin/analyst only.

action_items: (Optional) Return 404 from GET /api/borrowers/{id}/financials when borrower doesn't exist for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~975 lines — approaching the 700-line guideline; consider splitting into routers (auth, borrowers, recovery, financials, templates) for maintainability.

_recompute_and_persist re-categorizes after adding ratio points but never clamps to category 'critical' even when score==100; logic is fine but recategorization thresholds duplicated between risk_engine and server — extract.

seed_financials uses Python hash() for seeding which varies per process (PYTHONHASHSEED). Use a deterministic seed (e.g. uuid/borrower-id-hash via hashlib) for reproducible BS/PnL generation across restarts.
Recovery copilot endpoint has no rate limit; Claude Sonnet calls are 15-30s each and could be abused. Consider per-user/per-case throttling.
TEMPLATES dict is static in-module — fine, but downloads are not cached client-side because no ETag/Cache-Control header is set.
Several CRUD endpoints (alerts mark_read, notes list) lack borrower-existence checks; not a security issue but returns silent success on bad IDs.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed (12 borrowers) and seed-financials (4 quarters BS+PnL per borrower already in place). Uploaded stressed BS/PnL for 1 borrower under period 2025-Q1 / 2025-Q2 to verify ratio-based factor injection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 30 new iter3 tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3_financials.py. backend_test.py from iter2 still green. Recovery copilot tests do real Claude Sonnet calls — keep timeouts >=90s. Stressed BS/PnL uploaded to first borrower triggers DSCR<1, IC<1.5, CR<1, D/E>3, negative net margin — used as canonical fixture for ratio-factor regression.
